fields.Name: Rasa.io
fields.Description: Rasa.io newsletter platform integration for syncing persons (subscribers) and posts (content) via the Rasa.io REST API

fields.Name: persons
fields.Description: Newsletter subscribers with contact information, subscription status, and activity timestamps

fields.Name: external_id
fields.Description: External system identifier for this subscriber (e.g. CRM ID)

fields.Name: is_active
fields.Description: Whether the subscriber account is active

fields.Name: is_subscribed
fields.Description: Whether the subscriber is opted in to receive newsletters

fields.Name: segment_code
fields.Description: Segment code assigned to this subscriber

fields.Name: referred_by
fields.Description: Identifier of the person who referred this subscriber

fields.Name: referral_code
fields.Description: Referral code used by this subscriber

fields.Name: last_newsbrief
fields.Description: Timestamp of the last newsbrief sent to this subscriber

fields.Name: last_open
fields.Description: Timestamp when this subscriber last opened a newsletter

fields.Name: last_click
fields.Description: Timestamp when this subscriber last clicked a link in a newsletter

fields.Name: schedule_id
fields.Description: Identifier of the send schedule assigned to this subscriber

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: Timestamp when the subscriber was created in Rasa.io

fields.Name: updated
fields.Description: Timestamp when the subscriber was last updated in Rasa.io

fields.Name: posts
fields.Description: Newsletter content items curated and sent to subscribers

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: URL of the content item in Rasa.io

fields.Name: description
fields.Description: Summary or description of the content item

fields.Name: source_url
fields.Description: Original source URL of the content

fields.Name: image_url
fields.Description: URL of the content item's featured image

fields.Name: site_name
fields.Description: Name of the source website for this content item

fields.Name: quality_score
fields.Description: Rasa.io quality score for this content item

fields.Name: is_active
fields.Description: Whether the post is active and eligible for newsletter inclusion

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: Timestamp when the post was created in Rasa.io

fields.Name: updated
fields.Description: Timestamp when the post was last updated in Rasa.io

fields.Name: insights-actions
fields.Description: Individual subscriber engagement actions (opens, clicks) with content metadata and AI confidence scores

fields.Name: person_id
fields.Description: Rasa.io person identifier for the subscriber who performed this action

fields.Name: external_id
fields.Description: External system identifier for the subscriber

fields.Name: action_type
fields.Description: Type of engagement action (e.g. open, click)

fields.Name: issue_date
fields.Description: Date of the newsletter issue that triggered the action

fields.Name: url
fields.Description: URL that was clicked (for click actions)

fields.Name: email_subject
fields.Description: Subject line of the newsletter email

fields.Name: useragent
fields.Description: User agent string from the subscriber's browser or email client

fields.Name: title
fields.Description: Title of the content item that was clicked

fields.Name: confidence
fields.Description: Confidence score for AI-derived action classification

fields.Name: created
fields.Description: Timestamp when this action record was created in Rasa.io

fields.Name: insights-topics
fields.Description: Per-subscriber topic interest data derived from engagement history, showing topic weights and click timestamps

fields.Name: person_id
fields.Description: Rasa.io person identifier (serves as composite key with topic)

fields.Name: external_id
fields.Description: External system identifier for the subscriber

fields.Name: topic
fields.Description: Topic name (serves as composite key with person_id)

fields.Name: first_click
fields.Description: Timestamp of the subscriber's first click on this topic

fields.Name: last_click
fields.Description: Timestamp of the subscriber's most recent click on this topic

fields.Name: weight
fields.Description: Interest weight score for this topic indicating relative engagement strength

fields.Name: communities
fields.Description: Rasa.io newsletter communities available to the authenticated user

fields.Name: identifier
fields.Description: Community string identifier used in API paths

fields.Name: sections
fields.Description: Content sections within a community used to organize newsletter content

fields.Name: person-attributes
fields.Description: Key-value attributes associated with a person (subscriber custom data)

fields.Name: person-sends
fields.Description: Newsletter send history for a specific person including issue and delivery status

fields.Name: content-pool
fields.Description: Pool of curated content items available for newsletter inclusion

fields.Name: lead-posts
fields.Description: Featured/lead content posts that appear prominently in newsletters

fields.Name: analytics-activities
fields.Description: Aggregated newsletter activity metrics (opens, clicks, deliveries) over time

fields.Name: analytics-articles
fields.Description: Article click analytics ranked by engagement volume

fields.Name: analytics-images
fields.Description: Static image click analytics ranked by engagement volume

fields.Name: analytics-topics
fields.Description: Topic engagement analytics aggregated from content tags

fields.Name: unique_users
fields.Description: Number of unique users who engaged
